question:
Directions: Study the following data carefully
and answer the questions accordingly.
Eight different spices viz. Coriander, Fennel,
Jeera, Basil, Pepper, Cinnamon, Oregano, and
Turmeric are placed in a square box such that all
of them are facing towards the center, but not
necessarily in the same order. Four items are
placed at the corners while four items are placed
at the middle of the sides.
Cinnamon is placed at one of the corners of the
box. Two items are placed between Cinnamon
and Pepper, which is placed to the immediate left
of Oregano. The number of items between
Oregano and Cinnamon is the same as the
number of items between Pepper and Coriander
when counted from the left of Cinnamon and
Pepper. One item is placed between Coriander
and Turmeric, which is not placed adjacent to
Oregano. Fennel was placed to the immediate
left of Jeera.
How many items are placed between Jeera and
Oregano when counted from the left of Jeera?
questionHtml:
Directions: Study the following data carefully
and answer the questions accordingly.
Eight different spices viz. Coriander, Fennel,
Jeera, Basil, Pepper, Cinnamon, Oregano, and
Turmeric are placed in a square box such that all
of them are facing towards the center, but not
necessarily in the same order. Four items are
placed at the corners while four items are placed
at the middle of the sides.
Cinnamon is placed at one of the corners of the
box. Two items are placed between Cinnamon
and Pepper, which is placed to the immediate left
of Oregano. The number of items between
Oregano and Cinnamon is the same as the
number of items between Pepper and Coriander
when counted from the left of Cinnamon and
Pepper. One item is placed between Coriander
and Turmeric, which is not placed adjacent to
Oregano. Fennel was placed to the immediate
left of Jeera.
How many items are placed between Jeera and
Oregano when counted from the left of Jeera?
explanation:
1) Cinnamon is placed at one of the corners of
the box. Two items are placed between
Cinnamon and Pepper, which is placed to the
immediate left of Oregano.
2) The number of items between Oregano and
Cinnamon is the same as the number of items
between Pepper and Coriander when counted
from the left of Cinnamon and Pepper. One item
is placed between Coriander and Turmeric, which
is not placed adjacent to Oregano.
3) Fennel was placed to the immediate left of
Jeera. Hence, case 1 gets eliminated.
Final arrangement will be:-
According to the common solution we can say
that one item is placed between Jeera and
Oregano when counted from the left of Jeera.
Hence, the correct answer is option C.
explanationHtml:
1) Cinnamon is placed at one of the corners of
the box. Two items are placed between

immediate left of Oregano.
2) The number of items between Oregano and

3) Fennel was placed to the immediate left of

According to the common solution we can say

Oregano when counted from the left of Jeera.

question:
Answer the questions based on the information
given below.
 
Eight persons I, J, K, L, M, N, O and P are sitting
around a square table facing towards the center
of the table. Four persons are sitting center the
sides of the table while four are sitting at the
corner of the table. The one who are sitting in the
center the sides of the table like different
actresses i.e. Alia, Deepika, Kareena and Kiara
and the one who are sitting at the corner of the
square table like different actor i.e. Akshay,
Salman, Ranveer and Kartik.
I sits third to the left of the one who likes Kartik.
M likes Kiara and sits to the immediate right of N,
who does not like Kartik. O sits opposite to the
one who likes Alia. J sits to the immediate right
of L. The one who likes Ranveer sits to the
immediate left of the one who likes Deepika. O is
an immediate neighbor of the one who likes
Salman. P sits second to the right of K.

question:
Study the following information carefully and
answer the questions accordingly.
 
Eight persons - P, Q, R, S, T, U, V and W are sitting
on the square table such that all of them are
facing towards the centre, but not necessarily in
the same order. Two persons are sitting on each
side of the table. R sits immediate left of W. P sits
immediate left of S. U sits opposite to the one
who is immediate right of S. V sits second to the
left of U. T sits second to the left of R. When
counted from the right of V, the number of
persons sitting between U and V is the same as
the number of persons sitting S and W.
 
How many persons sit between Q and W when
counted from the left of Q?
